name_en: 🌸【Original leather with magnetic box packaging】▪️ROSE▪️New Fall/Winter style, same Hobo as Korean stars!! The Y brand has finally arrived with this year's exploding trend of underarm bags!! The bag's silhouette is simple and structured, looking structured without being too sharp. Paired with the brand's signature insert buckle, it gives a unique aura that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish.
name_cn:
🌸【Original leather with magnetic box packaging】▪️ROSE▪️New Fall/Winter style, same Hobo as Korean stars!! The Y brand has finally arrived with this year's exploding trend of underarm bags!! The bag's silhouette is simple and structured, looking structured without being too sharp.  Size: 23x22x8.5cm
 Model: 713938《Black calfskin with gold buckle》
